name: 25lb Steel Square Outdoor Patio Market Table Umbrella Base Black - Room Essentials™: Weather-Resistant, No Tools Needed
description:
Create a relaxing oasis with the help of this 25-Pound Steel Square Patio Market Table Umbrella Base from Room Essentials™. This steel base is compatible with centered pole market umbrellas, and it features a locking peg to help hold the umbrella securely in place. The rust-resistant construction promotes lasting use, while the solid black color looks great with a variety of umbrellas.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
